mappings.ns31a_signal: MRET instruction execution with privilege mode transition
mappings.notes: MRET restores previous privilege mode. Ibex asserts csr_restore_mret_id_o when MRET is executed. After MRET, privilege mode transitions from M to the mode stored in mstatus.MPP (observed via csr_restore_mret_id_o).

mappings.ns31a_signal: Debug mode return to user mode
mappings.notes: DRET instruction returns from debug mode. Ibex asserts csr_restore_dret_id_o when DRET is executed. After DRET, privilege mode should transition to the mode saved before entering debug (user mode in this case).

mappings.ns31a_signal: Exception causes transition to machine mode
mappings.notes: When an exception occurs (either in ID or WB stage), the privilege mode should transition to machine mode on the next cycle. Ibex signals id_exception_o and wb_exception_o indicate exception events.
When debug mode exits (debug_mode_o goes from 1 to 0), the privilege mode should be machine mode. This matches the NS31A assertion exactly using Ibex signals.

mappings.ns31a_signal: Reset causes machine mode with specific mstatus configuration
mappings.notes: During reset (rst_ni low), privilege mode should be machine mode and MIE should be 0. This is a reset-time property. Note: Ibex doesn't expose mstatus.MPP directly, so we check observable reset behavior.
When any exception occurs (id_exception_o or wb_exception_o asserted), the privilege mode should become machine mode on the next cycle. This matches the NS31A assertion.

mappings.ns31a_signal: Interrupt causes transition to machine mode when conditions met
mappings.notes: When an interrupt is pending (irq_pending_i) and interrupts are enabled (csr_mstatus_mie_i or priv_mode_i != PRIV_LVL_M), the privilege mode should transition to machine mode. Ibex internal signal handle_irq indicates interrupt handling.

mappings.ns31a_signal: Halt request causes transition from user mode to debug mode
mappings.notes: When debug_req_i is asserted and current privilege mode is user mode, the processor should enter debug mode (debug_mode_o or debug_mode_entering_o asserted).

mappings.ns31a_signal: Halt request causes transition from machine mode to debug mode
mappings.notes: When debug_req_i is asserted and current privilege mode is machine mode, the processor should enter debug mode (debug_mode_o or debug_mode_entering_o asserted).

When MRET is executed (mret_insn_i or csr_restore_mret_id_o asserted), the privilege mode should transition to the previous mode. Since Ibex doesn't expose mstatus.MPP directly, we check that privilege mode changes appropriately after MRET.
